title: kissing mod
description:
Kiss Mod: Better Social Interactions
Tired of expressing your friendship by just spamming the shift key? Kiss Mod adds essential social animations to Minecraft, making your multiplayer experience more alive and expressive!
body:
Kiss Mod: Better Social Interactions
Tired of expressing your friendship by just spamming the shift key? Kiss Mod adds essential social animations to Minecraft, making your multiplayer experience more alive and expressive!
Controls:
Kiss: Ctrl + Right Click (Show some love!)

Hug: Ctrl + Left Click (Give a warm embrace)

Slap: Ctrl + Middle Click (Scroll) (Give 'em a playful slap!)
✨ Why use it?
Perfect for roleplay and cinematic videos.

Great for streamers to interact with viewers.

Simple and intuitive controls that don't get in the way of gameplay.
